name: Stable Diffusion
title: Stable Diffusion & Generative AI Art
subtitle: Generate images professionally — from prompts to fine-tuned commercial workflows.
summary: Stable Diffusion + the open-source image generation ecosystem (Flux, SDXL, SD3, ControlNet, LoRAs) underpins most professional AI art workflows in 2026. This course covers the technology end-to-end: how diffusion models work, prompting techniques, ControlNet for guided generation, fine-tuning via LoRA + Dreambooth, ComfyUI for production pipelines, and commercial workflows. Practical patterns from concept art to e-commerce to film pre-vis.

modules.title: How diffusion models work
modules.objective: Understand the technology behind AI image generation.

lessons.title: Diffusion models — denoising your way to images
Model families — SD 1.5, SDXL, SD3, Flux
VAEs, encoders, and the latent space

modules.title: Prompting for professional results
modules.objective: Get the images you actually want.

modules.title: ControlNet and guided generation
modules.objective: Take precise control of what gets generated.

modules.title: Fine-tuning and customization
modules.objective: Teach the model your style, character, or product.

lessons.title: Commercial workflows — concept art, product, film
